data.title: Opendoor regains Nasdaq compliance, cancels stockholder meeting. Stock to remain listed on Nasdaq.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, Opendoor Technologies Inc. disclosed that it has satisfied Nasdaq's minimum bid price rule and will remain on the Nasdaq Global Select Market under the ticker symbol OPEN. Opendoor is a prominent online marketplace for buying and selling residential real estate. This news means that the company's common stock price has met the minimum threshold required by Nasdaq. The successful compliance ensures Opendoor's continued presence on the Nasdaq Global Select Market, offering stability to investors and demonstrating the company's adherence to regulatory standards. This update highlights the resilience and financial health of Opendoor, bolstering confidence in its operations and stock performance.

data.title: NETGEAR granted inducement equity awards to new employees under Nasdaq rule, expanding its talent pool.
data.description: In San Jose, California, NETGEAR, Inc. (Nasdaq: NTGR), a renowned provider of intelligent networking solutions, revealed the issuance of inducement equity awards to fresh recruits spanning various company divisions. These awards were granted under NETGEAR's inducement plan, specifically for offering equity incentives to individuals who were not part of the company before or had a legitimate break in employment with NETGEAR. The awards aim to attract new talent and boost engagement across departments.
